side_effects.description: AOD gelled on third vial; stopped using AOD due to gelling issue (user fault acknowledged)

protocol_notes: User recommends starting SS-31 at 4mg/day for 4 weeks, then following with MOTS-C. NAD+ starting at 25mg/day working up to 50mg/day. Advises waiting on other compounds until SS-31 and MOTS-C cycles are complete. Cautions against AOD due to limited data and gelling sensitivity. Concerned 5amino1MQ requires very high (expensive) doses to be effective. User follows OMAD diet (eating window 3pm-6pm), fasted for most of the day. Takes AOD in the morning in fasted state. Did not notice hunger changes on sermorelin/IPA blend, though attributes this to Tirzepatide coverage. Notes slight reduced insulin sensitivity concern from GHRH secretagogues but not worried due to fasted state.
